title: Peter Weidler
compiled_truth: Peter Weidler is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-10-22 to 2001-05-14), Peter Weidler sent 4 and received 116 emails, totalling 120 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (2), [Rebecca Mcdonald](people/rebecca-mcdonald) (2), [Eduardo Quintana](people/eduardo-quintana) (1), [Michael Terraso](people/michael-terraso) (1), [Henry Van](people/henry-van) (1).
